sourceMovie.title: Child's Play 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Child's Play 2 works as a horror movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The horror and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Case 39
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Child's Play 2 clicked for you, Case 39 (2009) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Child's Play 2?
faq.answer: Try Case 39, Thir13en Ghosts, The Lost Boys—each shares DNA with Child's Play 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Child's Play 2?
faq.answer: Child's Play 2 (1990) is best described as Horror, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Child's Play 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Child's Play Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
